/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/bitboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/magics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/zobrist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/position.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/movegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/eval.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/perft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/uci.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o engine
